title: An Act authorizing the town of Sharon to prohibit the use of second-generation anticoagulants

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Philips of Sharon and Senator Feeney, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5523) of Edward R. Philips (by vote of the town) that the town of Sharon be authorized to prohibit the use of second-generation anticoagulants in said town.  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources
the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/22/2026 from 01:00 PM-02:00 PM in A-2
